items.headline: Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, U.S. Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: On Thursday, lithium mining stocks broadly fell, U.S. Albemarle (ALB.US) down over 4%, Chilean chemical and mining (SQM.US) down 3%, Sigma Lithium (SGML.US) down over 2%, Lithium Argentina (LAR.US) down nearly 1%.

items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Stock Could Be 24.6% Undervalued After Recent Share Price Weakness
items.snippet: Albemarle's fair value sits at $212.74, well above the last close of $160.35. This puts the spotlight on the growth and margin story behind that gap. However, Albemarle's story also carries clear risks, especially if lithium prices stay weak for longer or if industry oversupply k

items.headline: Albemarle raised to buy at Citi with 'underappreciated' growth opportunities ahead

items.headline: This Divvie is the Ultimate "Pick and Shovel" Play on Elon Inc.
items.snippet: The bigger trend here is the demand for EV batteries. There are more and more on the road and they require one key ingredient for every EV that gets ordered, Tesla or no! That need for lithium benefits top producer Albemarle (ALB). ALB extracts and processes the lightweight metal
